creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
MASTER_SITES
============

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/sysutils/stress/Makefile?id=7f42cbd9b0dfa06cf917dd1a0b3f8295906c0672> changed this to: 

http://repository.timesys.com/buildsources/s/stress/

<http://repository.timesys.com/buildsources/s/stress/stress-1.0.4.tar.gz> is not found at the time of writing. 

(Found, when attempting to configure/build: 
<http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/stress-1.0.4.tar.gz>.)


Description
===========

<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/stress#description> refers to <http://people.seas.harvard.edu/~apw/stress/>, which is no longer found but in the Wayback Machine at: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20190707055144/http://people.seas.harvard.edu:80/~apw/stress/>
